data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (severity) + 1 (complexity) + 0 (environment) + 0 (intermittent) = 3 (INTERMEDIATE), override to ADVANCED per user request. Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed. Pre-investigation structural analysis found strong correlation: 3 SKILL.md files have 'allowed-tools' frontmatter field (playwright-debug, preplanning, ui-discover); reload-plugins shows '3 skills · 29 agents'; 32 skills total (32-3=29 without allowed-tools). Hypothesis: Claude Code plugin system loads SKILL.md files without 'allowed-tools' as 'agents' not 'skills', preventing Skill tool content injection. Dispatching ADVANCED investigation agents.
